title: Two-Factor Authentication
scanQr: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to verify.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this device?
loginDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
manualEntry: Enter this key manually in your authenticator app:
lostDevice: If you lose your authenticator device, contact your administrator. There is no automated recovery — we recommend enrolling more than one device.
